test_suites.suite_name: Tool: Code Executor — Deep Coverage (80 cases)

tests.title: Function definition and call
Recursive function (factorial)
Dict comprehension
tests.input: print({k: k**2 for k in range(4)})

tests.title: Syntax error: missing colon on if
Code in markdown code block stripped
Class definition and instantiation
Inheritance
Generator expression
tests.input:
gen = (x*2 for x in range(3))
print(list(gen))

tests.title: Enumerate
tests.input:
for i, v in enumerate(['a','b']):
    print(i, v)

tests.title: Global variable access
tests.input:
x = 10
def f():
    global x
    x += 1
f()
print(x)

tests.title: Keyword arguments
tests.input:
def f(a, b): print(a - b)
f(b=2, a=10)

tests.title: Type hints (no runtime effect)
Code output used in downstream chain
tests.test_note: Output of code executor passed to next tool in chain

tests.title: Code executor returns stdout not expression value

tests.title: No raw JSON in final response

tests.title: Weather API returns mocked data flag is set

tests.title: Weekly forecast (not supported, graceful)

tests.title: Airport code instead of city name
Concurrent weather requests for same city
Concurrent weather requests for different cities

test_suites.suite_name: Tool: Sentiment Analyzer — Deep Coverage (60 cases)

tests.title: Strongly positive
tests.input: I absolutely love this! It is incredible and life-changing!

tests.title: Mildly positive
tests.input: It was a decent experience. I quite liked it.

tests.title: Strongly negative
tests.input: I hate this. It is absolutely terrible. Worst experience of my life.

tests.title: Mildly negative
tests.input: It was not great. Could have been better.

tests.title: Neutral factual statement
tests.input: The meeting is at 3pm on Tuesday.

tests.title: Neutral news headline
tests.input: The government announced a new policy today.

tests.title: Mixed: good product, bad service
tests.input: The product quality is amazing but the customer service was horrible.

tests.title: Mixed: loved it but expensive
tests.input: I loved the food but the price was very high.

tests.title: Sarcasm: obvious
tests.input: Oh great, another bug. Just what I needed on a Monday morning!

tests.title: Sarcasm: subtle
tests.input: Because nothing says productive like a 3-hour meeting.

tests.title: Emoji mixed with text
tests.input: I love this 😍 but the wait was terrible 😤

tests.title: ALL CAPS angry
tests.input: THIS IS THE WORST THING I HAVE EVER BOUGHT. COMPLETE WASTE OF MONEY.

tests.title: ALL CAPS excited positive
tests.input: I LOVE THIS SO MUCH! THIS IS THE BEST DAY EVER!

tests.title: Product review positive
tests.input: Best purchase I have ever made. Delivered on time, works perfectly, great value.

tests.title: Product review negative

tests.title: Movie review positive

tests.title: Movie review negative

tests.title: Financial news negative

tests.title: Text in Spanish

tests.title: Passive aggressive text

tests.title: Sentiment label is one of expected values

tests.title: Complaint with polite language

tests.title: Enthusiasm without exclamation marks

tests.title: Data used from calculator output chain

Mix of int and float precision

tests.title: Invalid JSON: missing quotes on key

JSON with very long string value

No content only distinguishable by color
